creator: hennes@Stack.nl
text:
Here is the output from a Dell powerEdge R3000 for the list at
http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html


Motherboard and NICs work fine.
The onboard graphics are not tested.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

NB: The MPT output is from a plugged in SAS card.
